# Test Fixtures

Use fixtures for regressions discovered through `.agents/improve-this-kit/feedback/`
or `.agents/improve-this-kit/proposals/`.

Good fixture candidates:

- Empty project.
- Project with existing `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `.gitignore`.
- Project with legacy managed markers.
- Project with existing `.agents/skills/` content.

Every accepted kit improvement should add or update a focused test or fixture
when the behavior can regress.
